properties.name: okapi.purger.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox purger is enabled.

properties.name: okapi.purger.retention
properties.description: How long to keep delivered entries before purging.

properties.name: okapi.purger.batch-size
properties.description: Number of entries deleted per batch. Each purge cycle may execute multiple batches.

properties.name: okapi.processor.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox processor is enabled.

properties.name: okapi.processor.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of pending entries to process per tick.

properties.name: okapi.processor.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of delivery retries before marking an entry as failed.

properties.name: okapi.datasource-qualifier
properties.description: Name of the DataSource bean to use for the outbox. When set, okapi uses this specific DataSource instead of the primary one. Required in multi-datasource setups where the outbox table is not in the primary database.
